items.title: The shadow fleet : How Iran keeps its oil flowing despite sanctions and war

RT by @WhiteHouse: Eighty-two years ago, Allied forces stormed the beaches of Normandy into the hell of war — answering the call of duty in defense of freedom.

Today, we honor their courage, remember their sacrifice, and remain forever grateful for the liberty they secured for generations to come.
items.summary:
Eighty-two years ago, Allied forces stormed the beaches of Normandy into the hell of war — answering the call of duty in defense of freedom.

Today, we honor their courage, remember their sacrifice, and remain forever grateful for the liberty they secured for generations to come.

items.title: War in Iran Approaches 100 Day Mark
items.summary: American forces headed off Iranian missile and drone attacks in the Persian Gulf as the war that began nearly 100 days ago continued to simmer with no resolution in the offing. Six ballistic missiles fired at Bahrain and Kuwait “were intercepted and a seventh did not reach its intended target,” US Central Command said in a statement on X late Friday. Bloomberg News Congressional Reporter Steven De

items.title: Pope begins Spain visit with praise for country's opposition to war and support for migrants
items.summary: On the first day of his official seven-day tour of Spain, the Pope praises the country's "active commitment to peace and solidarity among peoples".

items.title: Hegseth attacks Europe over 'invasion' of migrants on its beaches in D-Day speech

items.title: ECB Steps Up as G7’s Lead Hawk With Interest-Rate Hike Primed
items.summary: A euro-zone interest-rate hike in the coming week is set to place the European Central Bank at the vanguard of global tightening caused by the Iran war.
